subcodes.first_line: O concourse of earth! Hearken unto the call of the Wronged One, Who maketh mention of you in the Most Great Prison and guideth you unto the path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ملا الارض اسمعوا ندآء المظلوم الذی یذکرکم فی السجن الاعظم و یهدیکم الی صراط
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @chastisement and requital, @prophecy and fulfillment
